page.title: Playbooks
page.description: Automated conversation flows and responses for your agents

empty.createFirst: Create your first playbook to automate conversations.

form.triggerPlaceholder:
This playbook will be activated when customer says:
 - I need help with my account...
form.triggerHint: Define when this playbook should be activated
form.instructionsHint: Create numbered step-by-step instructions that agents will follow when executing this playbook
form.noAgentsAvailable: No agents available. Create agents first.

create.title: Create New
create.description: Define automated conversation flows for your agents
create.headDescription: Create a new automated conversation playbook

validation.titleMaxLength: Playbook title must be less than 255 characters
validation.triggerMaxLength: Trigger must be less than 255 characters

toast.saveFailed: Failed to {action} playbook. Please try again.
toast.generateFailed: Failed to generate instructions. Please try again.
toast.createFailed: Failed to create playbook. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Playbook
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

wizard.title: Create Playbook
wizard.description: Follow the steps to create a new playbook

cancelDialog.title: Leave wizard?
cancelDialog.description: Your progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?

successDialog.title: Playbook Created
successDialog.description: Your playbook has been created successfully. What would you like to do next?
